heading: Step 4: Test the Function
body:
In the **Testing Console** tab beneath the Function editor, you can
test the Function by passing in example values to the `error` and
`changeEvent` parameters, as shown in the comments of the testing console.

For more information on these parameters, refer to the
[Error Handler Parameters](atlas-eventbridge-error-handler-parameters)
section on this page.

Click **Run** to run the test.
